title: Device Request - Smart Mini Switch Zigbee - Zbeacon / TS0001
excerpt:
### Prerequisites:

- Before requesting a device addition, please ensure there is not already a request for the device among the open issues.
- Make sure your Homey is upgraded to firmware v5 or higher.
- You need a physical example of the device.

### Device Information

- Device Name: `Provide the name of the device`
- Device Model: `Provide the model number or identifier`
- Device Description: `Describe in short the functionality of the device`
- Link to device image: https://ae-pic-a1.aliexpress-media.com/kf/Sd00430e5a125434ab245567dcc1aacdfs.jpg_220x220q75.jpg_.avif

aiAnalysis:
Based on the GitHub issue and device interview data provided, here is the structured device information:

## Device Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Device Name** | Smart Mini Switch Zigbee |
| **Device Model** | TS0001 |
| **Manufacturer** | Zbeacon |
| **Device Type** | Router (mains-powered) |
| **Firmware** | 0122052017 |
| **Application Device ID** | 256 (On/Off Light) |

## Fingerprint

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **manufacturerName** | `Zbeacon` |
| **productId** | `TS0001` |

## Endpoint 1 Clusters

| Cluster ID | Cluster Name | Purpose |
|------------|--------------|---------|
| 0x0000 | Basic | Device info, version |
| 0x0003 | Identify | Identify mode |
| 0x1888 | (6280) | Unknown Tuya-specific |
| 0x0004 | Groups | Group membership |
| 0x0005 | Scenes | Scene recall |
| **0x0006** | **On/Off** | **Switch control** |
| 0x000A | Time | Time cluster |
| 0xE000 | (57344) | Tuya manufacturer-specific |
| 0xE001 | (57345) | Tuya manufacturer-specific |
| 0x1000 | (4096) | Unknown |

## Capabilities

| Capability | Value |
|------------|-------|
| **onoff** | ✅ Supported (cluster 0x0006) |
| **measure_battery** | ❌ Not supported (mains-powered) |
| **Power Source** | Mains (router) |

## Driver Recommendation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Driver** | `switch_1gang` |
| **Reason** | TS0001 with On/Off cluster (0x0006) on endpoint 1, no dimmer or multi-gang clusters |
| **Notes** | ZCL-only device (no Tuya DP cluster 0xEF00). Standard on/off switch. |

## Pairing Instructions

1. Install the app from: https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/
2. Put the device in pairing mode (factory reset: press and hold button 5-10 seconds until LED blinks)
3. Add device in Homey → Add Device → Search for "Zbeacon"
4. The device should be automatically recognized as a 1-gang switch

## Status

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Already Supported?** | ✅ Yes |
| **Driver** | `switch_1gang` |
| **Fingerprint** | `Zbeacon` + `TS0001` should match existing `_TZ3000_*` + `TS0001` entries |
| **Action Required** | None - device should pair automatically |
